30-(-28987)]]TH[465418+-465262]=a[g]TH[-443042+443201]=O(150608-175381)TH[-323491-(-323648)]=a[I]TH[713871-713713]=TH[259450-259293](TH[863204+-863045],TH[-729780+729940])TH[737267-737112]=TH[221286-221130][TH[826596-826438]]TH[-989024+989181]=a[g]TH[747251+-747091]=O(422912+-446721)TH[-731094+731252]=a[I]TH[-523634-(-523793)]=TH[-99980-(-100138)](TH[-398344-(-398504)],TH[338676-338515])TH[448988-448832]=TH[-99049+99206][TH[1000131-999972]]TH[910888+-910727]=O(-777174+754386)TH[-986748-(-986906)]=a[g]TH[491262+-491103]=a[I]TH[300857-300697]=TH[58426-58267](TH[-353274+353435],TH[-56347+56509])TH[-554532+554689]=TH[-1032419-(-1032577)][TH[-44032+44192]]TH[533495-533336]=a[g]TH[-95599-(-95761)]=O(272573+-296776)TH[383273+-383113]=a[I]TH[794057+-793896]=TH[275180-275020](TH[606877-606715],TH[37784+-37621])TH[953192+-953029]=O(-116351-(-94276))TH[423819+-423661]=TH[-821841+822000][TH[-220816-(-220977)]]TH[796075+-795915]=a[g]TH[584372-584211]=a[I]TH[-116110-(-116272)]=TH[476877+-476716](TH[-710938+711101],TH[133143+-132979])TH[-647201-(-647360)]=TH[332560+-332400][TH[762430-762268]]TH[-233171+233332]=a[g]TH[-784016-(-784178)]=a[I]TH[386886-386722]=O(408404+-432706)TH[363070-362907]=TH[-1033789-(-1033951)](TH[-113268+113432],TH[283172+-283007])TH[-555479-(-555644)]=O(287201-310622)TH[-67047-(-67207)]=TH[276017+-275856][TH[-1020105-(-1020268)]]TH[-365715-(-365877)]=a[g]TH[-790462+790625]=a[I]TH[-209813+209977]=TH[-15720+15883](TH[384644+-384479],TH[-566995+567161])TH[173425-173264]=TH[-976783-(-976945)][TH[-152698+152862]]TH[-381123-(-381286)]=a[g]TH[-729256+729422]=O(-16066+-7469)TH[63365-63201]=a[I]TH[-861672+861837]=TH[176979-176815](TH[822086+-821920],TH[-322629+322796])TH[-92704+92866]=TH[-649456+649619][TH[727924-727759]]TH[968179+-968012]=O(-92767-(-70021))TH[-980265+980429]=a[g]TH[-650198+650363]=a[I]TH[-828022-(-828188)]=TH[203968+-203803](TH[675875-675708],TH[859745-859577])TH[-348935-(-349103)]=O(37052+-61229)TH[-282492-(-282655)]=TH[126950-126786][TH[-206978+20
